permits.description: priority process: renovation to listed historic library(1921). partial demo of int spaces of historic bldg & 1996 renovation work. new mech, elec, and fire protection sys will be provided throughout (e) bldg. project is designed to leadership in energy efficient design (leed) rating of gold
upgrade mechanical cooling system,el distribution to cooling system

install 8 kw solar 66 solar panels on a non-penatrating array ballasted with cinderblock. install an inverter on the roof and install 2 disconnects (dc & ac). the electricity would be then tied into the meter.
